subject: [PATCH pynfs 08/13] server41tests: test OFFLOAD_STATUS with fabricated stateid

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test case to the server41tests suite called testOffloadStatusNoState, which tests the OFFLOAD_STATUS operation by sending it with a fabricated stateid and verifying that the server returns NFS4ERR_BAD_STATEID. The test is designed to ensure that the server correctly handles invalid stateids in this context. This patch addresses potential issues related to stateid validation in the OFFLOAD_STATUS operation.
